reviewedCourts.reviewReason: The club confirms basketball courts and member open play, but no public basketball timetable is posted. Current multi-sport camps have dated sessions, but their public listings do not specify when basketball occurs within the camp day.
The City confirms the park basketball court, but no current public run, league, tournament, camp, clinic, or team schedule could be tied to it.

The Central Park courts are publicly documented, but no current dated or recurring public basketball activity was found at 1740 Stevenson Boulevard. Dynamic private lesson availability is not treated as a public court event.
Current official HoopSphere pages document six weekly Fremont League divisions and four upcoming 2026 summer camp starts at the exact Flagship address.
The current official Theatre Gym camp page documents four upcoming 2026 summer camp starts at the exact followed-court address.
The current official facility page confirms Saturday basketball from 7:00-9:00 AM on Court B and no longer lists the previously published Friday 12:30-1:30 PM slot.

nonPublishedFindings.scheduleText: Bay Club Fremont lists weekday multi-sport camps from July 13 through August 28, generally 9:00 AM-4:00 PM.
nonPublishedFindings.reviewReason: The basketball amenity page establishes that Fremont offers basketball, but the camp calendar does not prove a basketball segment on a particular camp date or time.

courtSchedules.sourceTitle: Wally Pond Irvington Community Center | City of Fremont
courtSchedules.seasonEndBasis: operational re-verification horizon; the current official page presents the Saturday basketball schedule without a stated end date
courtSchedules.access: First-come, first-served. Current facility pricing is $5 for Fremont residents and $6 for non-residents

slots.title: Drop-In Basketball - Wally Pond Irvington Community Center
